The breakthrough idea targets a structurally distinct rational/power family. The logistic plateau is currently 0.9161. The Hill form is a genuinely different shape. However, the logistic with a Richards exponent already does asymmetric sigmoids well. The key risk with Hill: a pure power-of-time has zero lag (no flat region near t=0 unless n large), and the data here is min-max normalized in time so the lag region matters.
